title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Kale Consultants South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Kale Consultants South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Kale Consultants South Asia Partners in Vadodara offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Kale Consultants South Asia Partners:
Kale Consultants South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kale Consultants South Asia Partners!
